title: Rise of the Ottomans
description: Medieval nation roleplay and geopolitical strategy
body:
The year is 1337. Europe is divided, kingdoms bicker, and the old empires weaken. East of the Bosporus, the House of Osman watches and waits. The rise of the Ottomans is just beginning—and the future of a continent hangs in the balance, or rather, the future of all of Christendom.

Will you stand beside them and shape a new empire? Or resist them with the fractured powers of Christendom?

# Completely Custom Europe Map
Our custom-made map covers all of Europe and surrounding regions, designed for large-scale strategy, roleplay, and conflict. Every biome and structure is placed with accuracy to match the real-world setting of the 14th century.

# Over 20 Playable Factions
Choose from a wide range of medieval powers, from the Byzantines, the Holy Roman Empire, and the Papal States to the rising Ottomans, Slavic principalities, merchant republics, and more. Each faction has its own territory, story, and goals.

# Custom Questlines
Every faction features unique quests tailored to its history and ambitions. Whether you're expanding your domain, forging alliances, or clashing with enemies, your path is your own.

# Structures, NPCs & World Events
Immerse yourself in a living world with custom-built cities, castles, and fortresses, along with dynamic NPCs and scripted events. Expect diplomacy, betrayal, and power struggles.

# Advanced Diplomacy System
Form alliances, negotiate truces, declare war—or play the long game through influence and trade. Our diplomatic mechanics allow for both open conflict and subtle scheming.

Join us in Rise of the Ottomans and help shape the future of medieval Europe. Whether you conquer or defend, forge a legacy that history won’t forget.
